name: Wide Standoff
description: Larger groups facing off across an open space.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Two groups facing off across open ground.
{setting}. A standoff at scale — figures lined on opposite sides.
{setting}. A divided frame, clusters of figures on either side.
background_pool: A wide dusty street between two rows of weathered wooden buildings, late afternoon sun casting long shadows across the packed dirt, tumbleweed debris in the foreground, distant mountains under a haze
An abandoned warehouse floor, concrete pillars casting geometric shadows, shafts of light from broken skylights, scattered debris and old pallets, vast empty space between metal walls
A sprawling plaza of cracked stone tiles, bordered by crumbling neo-classical facades, overcast sky pressing down, puddles reflecting grey light, scattered rubble along the edges
A dry riverbed cutting through a canyon, sheer rock walls rising on both sides, boulders strewn across the flat sandy floor, harsh midday sun bleaching the stone, distant thunderclouds building
A ruined city boulevard, burned-out car husks lining the curb, shattered glass glinting on asphalt, collapsed overpass in the background, smoke drifting across the frame
action_pool: hands raised, palms out, slowing the tension
jaw set, eyes locked on the opposition
